topic: Unreal Engine, Game Development, Real-time Rendering, Graphics Programming, UE5 Features

relevance_criteria: Official Unreal Engine feature releases or major updates
Advanced rendering techniques, optimization strategies, or pipeline workflows
Production case studies from shipped games or real-time projects
Technical deep-dives into UE5 features (Nanite, Lumen, MetaHuman, etc.)
quality_indicators: Includes code snippets, Blueprint examples, or configuration details
Provides performance metrics, profiling data, or before/after comparisons
Discusses implementation challenges and solutions with technical depth
Offers downloadable project files, plugins, or reproducible setups
reject_patterns: Beginner tutorials or 'how to get started' guides
Q&A posts asking for help without providing solutions
Asset showcase without technical breakdown or workflow explanation
General game industry news unrelated to Unreal Engine technology
